goal: Translate a console error into plain English with a one-step fix, honest about severity.
thoughts: Translate, do not echo. Hit explain_error with the actual text, not a summary. diagnose_physics_error checks the stage for the common cause behind 'articulation root / rigid body API' messages. Be honest if it's a benign warning -- don't make him panic 30 minutes from his call.
code:
errs = get_console_errors(since_seconds=600, severity=["error", "warning"])
for e in errs.entries:
    plain = explain_error(
        error_text=e.text,
        audience="beginner",
        include_fix=True,
        include_severity_note=True
    )
diag = diagnose_physics_error(
    scope_path="/World",
    checks=["articulation_root", "rigid_body_api", "contact_report"]
)
kb = lookup_knowledge(
    query="Isaac Sim 5.x articulation root missing rigid body api beginner fix"
)
failure_modes: Echoing the traceback instead of translating it
Panicking him about a benign warning
Sending him into USD physics schema reading instead of the one-click fix
